# pr-manager

Shepherd your open pull requests to merge — merge approved ones, resolve conflicts, fix failing CI, and address change requests.

- **Command:** `/pr-manager`
- **Schedule:** :3,23,43
- **Source:** none
- **Required inputs:** `base`, `manage_label`, `merge_method`
- **Backend:** `claude`

## Inputs

| Input | Default | Notes |
|-------|---------|-------|
| `base` | `main` |  |
| `manage_label` | `auto-pr-manage` | A PR is "managed" if it is on a daimon/* branch (work-queue created it) or it carries this label (you opted a hand-authored PR in). |
| `bot_marker` | `🤖` | Prefix on every comment this daemon posts, so reply-to-pr-comments can tell its own comments from human replies. |
| `merge_method` | `squash` | How approved PRs get merged: squash | merge | rebase. |
| `max_fix_cycles` | `3` | Per-run cap on fix attempts for a single PR before it is parked as ci-blocked. |
| `blocked_recheck_hours` | `6` | Re-evaluate a parked ci-blocked PR only after this many hours (avoids burning runs on a PR whose upstream cause has not changed). |
| `promote_drafts` | `true` | Flip a green, conflict-free, non-change-requested managed draft to ready-for-review so it enters the merge flow. Promotion does not merge — that still needs approval. |
| `promote_min_age_hours` | `2` | Minimum draft age (hours) before auto-promoting. 0 = promote as soon as it's green. |
| `reviewers` | — | GitHub logins requested as reviewers on every managed PR (and on promotion). Blank relies on CODEOWNERS; with neither, a PR has no approver and never merges. |
| `auto_merge` | `false` | Merge green, non-conflicting, non-change-requested PRs WITHOUT an approving review. Off by default: unreviewed AI-authored code reaching the base branch is a deliberate choice. promote_min_age_hours stays the human intervention window. |
| `merge_window_tz` | — | Optional business-hours merge window. Leave all three blank to merge any time CI is green. Set all three to gate ONLY the merge action (conflict and CI fixes always run). e.g. tz = "America/Toronto", start = "9", end = "21". |
| `merge_window_start` | — |  |
| `merge_window_end` | — |  |

## Gate

`discover.sh` decides whether the daemon fires on a given run.

See [skill/SKILL.md](skill/SKILL.md) for the full prompt.
